creator: chifeng@gmail.com
text:
Submit a new ports for apolicy software, please help commit to ports tree,
thank you very much!

ACL Policy Daemon is a program that communicates with the Postfix MTA using the 
Policy Delegation Protocol implementing an ACL (Access Control List) system, 
making very easy to improve and create nice controls on your e-mail traffic. 
You can use it to verify SPF records too.

WWW: http://www.apolicy.org

Fix: 

please download this ports files here

http://www.chifeng.name/dist/apolicy/py-apolicy.tar.gz


chifeng# pwd
/usr/ports/mail/py-apolicy
chifeng# portlint -CN
looks fine.
chifeng# portlint -a
looks fine.
